text:
To set up FlowBlinq GEO on your Shopify site, follow these steps:

1. **Edit theme.liquid**:
   - Go to your Shopify admin panel.
   - Navigate to **Online Store → Themes**.
   - Click on **Actions → Edit code**.
   - Open the **Layout** folder and select **theme.liquid**.

2. **Add the FlowBlinq script**:
   - In the **<head>** section of the **theme.liquid** file, paste the FlowBlinq script provided in the **Setup tab** of your audit page. Make sure to replace any placeholder slugs with your actual FlowBlinq slug.

3. **Save your changes**:
   - Click **Save** to apply the changes.

4. **Verify your setup**:
   - Return to the FlowBlinq GEO portal and check the **Setup tab** for any additional instructions or verification steps.

This will help ensure your Shopify site is optimized for AI visibility. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
